productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Blue Shoes
description: Style Note A flexible outsole with a plush fabric upper, you'll never have a style slump when you're off-duty, if you're equipped with this Benetton pair. Wear this with a tonal monochrome tee or a bomber jacket. Product Details denim blue canvas with slip on styling and overlays (also styled like a boat shoe at the mouth) Padded tongue and inner Upper adhered to the outsole TPU outsole with herringbone and rectangular grooves Material and Care Blended fabric Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in sunlight Use a leather conditioner to polish the upper
